goal: Add sum.js exporting sum(a,b)=a+b with a passing node:test
title: sum js module

sprints.title: implement and test sum
sprints.description: Create sum.js that exports a function sum(a, b) returning a + b (use module.exports or ESM export consistent with the project setup). Add a test file using node:test and node:assert that imports sum and verifies core behavior: positive integers (sum(1,2)===3), negative numbers, zero, and floating-point values. Ensure the tests run and pass via `node --test`.
